section.heading: Resident citizenship of State as qualification for entry

content.p: Excepting in the State of Nevada, no person shall be entitled to make entry of desert lands unless he be a resident citizen of the State or Territory in which the land sought to be entered is located.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section is comprised of the second clause of section 8 of act Mar. 3, 1877, as added by act Mar. 3, 1891. The first clause of section 8 of act Mar. 3, 1877, is incorporated in section 323 of this title.
Act Jan. 6, 1921, inserted introductory exception phrase.

note.heading: Section as Unaffected by Submerged Lands Act
note.p: Provisions of this section as not amended, modified or repealed by the Submerged Lands Act, see section 1303 of this title.
